title: Meaning, Value, and Pain as Emergent Phenomena
one_sentence: This module defines meaning, value, and pain as emergent structural phenomena after irreversible trace persistence and regulation.

core_compression.meaning: trajectory direction / bias toward an attractor
core_compression.value: trajectory fixation strength ≈ deviation cost under irreversibility
core_compression.pain: irreversible trajectory tension under attractor conflict

transitionability.principle: local pain minimization is not always global transitionability optimization
transitionability.description: A system may increase short-term tension to preserve long-horizon feasibility.

negative_constraints: Do not treat this as a proof of subjective suffering.
Do not treat value as moral approval.
Do not treat meaning as purely semantic interpretation.
Do not include love, sacrifice, or normative ethics in this module.
